title: Require Artifact Index Aggregate Shape
forbids: artifacts/index.ts barrels that own schema, validation, or non-artifact wiring
why: Artifact directory indexes are selection surfaces only. Artifact owner files define schemas and validators; indexes aggregate artifact modules and validator references without becoming a second validation owner.
remediate: Keep artifacts/index.ts limited to sibling namespace imports from ./*.artifact.js, re-exported artifact modules, artifactContracts, and validators pointing to each artifact module's validate export.
message: Artifact directory indexes must stay aggregate-only.
